params.name: limit
params.description: Records per page (1-1000). Default 15.

params.name: page
params.description: Result page number, 1-indexed.

params.name: where
params.description: MongoDB-style filter object. Supports operators $eq, $ne, $gt, $gte, $lt, $lte, $in, $nin, $regex, $type, $exists, $and, $or, $nor, $all, $elemMatch, $size.

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort expression, e.g. "name asc" or "date_created desc".

params.name: search
params.description: Full-text search across model-specific searchable fields.

params.name: expand
params.description: Include related objects, e.g. expand=account or expand=variants:10.

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return.

params.name: id
params.description: The object ID of the resource.
